title: Taittiriya Aranyaka: The Inner Fire
description: Taittiriya Aranyaka — Brahmana or Aranyaka literature explaining the meaning of the Vedic rituals.
introduction: Taittiriya Aranyaka — Brahmana or Aranyaka literature explaining the meaning of the Vedic rituals.

translation.text: The forest hermit has renounced external fires. He has internalized them. The fire of his digestion is the garhapatya fire. The fire of his speech is the ahavaniya. The fire of his mind is the dakshinagni. He worships within himself.
